query: I need design help for a product surface, but I cannot tell whether this is really palette guidance, token work, or some kind of generative UI problem.
why: The request is explicitly ambiguous within the design family and should enter the using-design router first.

query: Turn our brand inputs into a reusable design token spec and write the design system rules down so engineering can implement them.
why: This is clearly a design-family request centered on a token-spec deliverable.

query: Build an Apple-style liquid glass control in Chromium with SVG displacement maps and refraction.
why: This is an explicit liquid-glass design request and belongs in the design router.

query: Build a SaaS customer portal with auth, billing, settings, and an admin dashboard.
why: This is an ordinary website-building request, not an ambiguous design-family routing problem.

query: Fix the responsive navbar overflow bug in this React app and make the tests pass.
why: This is a straightforward implementation bugfix, not a request to choose among design-specific skills.
